overview: CatFinity is a tutorial website for learning (∞, 1)-categories, featuring 8 structured lessons with KaTeX math rendering, Internet Identity authentication, per-learner progress tracking, Twitter/X integration, and AI-powered Q&A panels on every lesson page and the landing page.
features: 8 lessons covering (∞,1)-category theory with KaTeX math rendering
Twitter/X integration with OAuth 2.0 PKCE for sharing completions
AI-powered Q&A panel on every lesson page (per-lesson context)
Global AI Q&A panel on the landing page
Per-user OpenAI API key stored securely, masked input on Settings page
Dark/light mode toggle with academic serif design
